title: Trump stirred rumors for years. Now, it’s the Clintons’ turn to speak about Epstein.
author: Karen Tumulty, Yasmeen Abutaleb
fullText: Bill and Hillary Clinton have survived decades of scrutiny and conspiracy theories. Often, their adversaries come out on the losing end.
summary: Bill and Hillary Clinton have survived decades of scrutiny and conspiracy theories. Often, their adversaries come out on the losing end.
